subject: Cannot access my account
body:
Hi Support,

I have been trying to log into my account since this morning but keep getting an 'Invalid credentials' error. I'm sure my password is correct. Can you please help me regain access?

Thanks,
Alice

subject: Billing discrepancy on invoice #4821
body:
Hello,

I noticed a charge of $49.99 on my latest invoice (#4821), but I'm on the $29.99 plan. Could you please review and correct this?

Best regards,
Bob Martinez

subject: Request for dark mode feature
body:
Hey team,

Just wanted to suggest adding a dark mode to the dashboard. It would be much easier on the eyes during late-night sessions.

Cheers,
Carlos

subject: App crashes when uploading images
body:
Hi,

The mobile app (v3.2.1, Android 14) crashes every time I try to upload an image larger than 5 MB. Smaller files work fine.

Please fix — it's blocking my workflow.

Thanks,
Diana

subject: Great product, but one suggestion
body:
Just wanted to share that I love the analytics dashboard — it's been incredibly useful. One minor suggestion: it would be great if we could export reports as CSV files.

Keep up the great work!
Evan

subject: How do I add team members?
body:
Hello Support,

I just upgraded to the Team plan but cannot figure out how to invite new members. Where is this option?

Regards,
Fatima

subject: I want to cancel my subscription
body:
Hi,

Please cancel my subscription effective immediately. I no longer need the service.

Thank you,
George Patel
Account #GP-29384

subject: API returns 500 errors intermittently
body:
Our integration has been getting intermittent 500 errors from your /api/v2/data endpoint for the past 2 hours. We've attached our request logs.

This is affecting production. Please investigate urgently.

Hannah Lee
Senior Developer, DataSync Inc.
